headline: Aptiv Announces Commencement of $1.5 Billion Private Offering of Senior Notes by Its Electrical Distribution Systems Spin-Off Subsidiaries, Cyprium Corporation and Cyprium Holdings Luxembourg S.à r.l.
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, March 04, 2026--Aptiv PLC ("Aptiv") (NYSE:APTV), a global industrial technology company focused on enabling a more automated, electrified, and digitalized future, today announced the commencement of a private offering of $1.5 billion aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2031 (the "2031 Notes") and senior notes due 2034 (the "2034 Notes" and, together with the 2031 Notes, the "Notes") by its subsidiaries, Cyprium Corporation ("Cyprium Corp.") and Cyprium Holdi
